query:
SELECT s.id, s.code, s.name, s.displayOrder, s.isActive 
FROM formSections s
JOIN requestTypes rt ON s.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE rt.code = 'admin_visit'
ORDER BY s.displayOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT s.id, s.code, s.name, s.displayOrder, s.isActive 
FROM formSections s
JOIN requestTypes rt ON s.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE rt.code = 'admin_visit'
ORDER BY s.displayOrder;
